title: crassula × pulverulenta
intro: Crassula × pulverulenta, also known as the snow bush or silver jade plant, is a hybrid succulent species obtained from the cross between Crassula ovata and Crassula arborescens. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Crassula × pulverulenta include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
